message:
[low] fuzz: register audit_tamper_chain_events + store_gc_object_headers bins

Wires the existing fuzz_targets/*.rs sources into Cargo.toml so
`cargo fuzz run` can reach the audit-tamper and store-GC harnesses
without a manual --bin override.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.7 (1M context) <noreply@anthropic.com>

files.patch:
@@ -105,6 +105,13 @@ test = false
 doc = false
 bench = false
 
+[[bin]]
+name = "fuzz_audit_tamper_chain_events"
+path = "fuzz_targets/audit_tamper_chain_events.rs"
+test = false
+doc = false
+bench = false
+
 [[bin]]
 name = "fuzz_canonical_cbor"
 path = "fuzz_targets/canonical_cbor.rs"
@@ -175,6 +182,13 @@ test = false
 doc = false
 bench = false
 
+[[bin]]
+name = "fuzz_store_gc_object_headers"
+path = "fuzz_targets/store_gc_object_headers.rs"
+test = false
+doc = false
+bench = false
+
 [[bin]]
 name = "fuzz_oauth_redirect_allowlist"
 path = "fuzz_targets/oauth_redirect_allowlist.rs"
